channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DraftKings Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $200 in Bonus Bets if Your Bet Wins
item.description: Bet $5, get $300 in bonus bets with DraftKings for new users.

item.title: BetMGM Bonus Code 'FOXSPORTS' Gets Up to $1,500 Paid Back in Bonus Bets
item.description: Use BetMGM Bonus Code FOXSPORTS to get up to $1,500 back in Bonus Bets if your first wager loses. Claim your BetMGM welcome offer today.

item.title: FanDuel Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $100 in Bonus Bets If Your Bet Wins
item.description: Bet $5 or more, get $100 back in bonus bets if your bet wins with our FanDuel sportsbook offer for new users.

item.title: Best Sports Betting Apps 2026: Top Betting Sites Reviewed
item.description: Compare the best sports betting apps and sites for 2026. See reviews, bonuses, and features to help choose the right sportsbook for your needs.

item.title: Best Sportsbook Promos & Bonus Bets - March 2026 Top Offers
item.description: Discover the best sportsbook promos and bonus bets for February 2026. Compare welcome offers and top bonuses from leading betting sites.

item.title: Fans' guide to men's basketball this March: The 10 most important things to know
item.description: The five teams at the top. The players to watch. The narratives likely to shape the conference and NCAA tournaments.

item.title: Fantasy baseball: Eric Karabell's 'Do not draft' list
item.description: Eric Karabell identifies the players unlikely to be on his roster this season due to too much risk, too much hype or not enough at-bats.

item.title: Men's Bracketology: Champ Week chaos is alive and well
item.description: True to form, the early conference tournaments have provided upsets and some unexpected champions.

item.title: How the schedule could impact three key NBA playoff races
item.description: With so many teams tanking, some playoff-bound teams could capitalize on easy schedules down the stretch.

item.title: What if KD's sneaker was smaller? An alternate timeline with new champs and wild trades
item.description: ESPN analyst Zach Kram examines a reality in which Durant's foot didn't touch the 3-point line in the 2021 Eastern Conference semifinals -- and its ri...
